title: Week 03 - Counting and Classification
description: Practice loop counting with a condition.

questions.title: Count Even Numbers from 1 to n

description.statement: Count how many even numbers appear from 1 through n.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n)
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, n do
        if i % 2 == 0 then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end
